description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu logged 35 hrs 51 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 6 mins. His tracked work was mostly in Other (39%), Java (38%), and Markdown (14%), across 6 projects. There were no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new public repositories recorded this week.
